name: eval-3-chain-to-prompt-to-skill
context_setup: Previous turns: user walked through a repeatable weekly status update generation process. It worked. Phase 3 of workflow-lock has just produced the structured workflow definition.
expected_behavior: Recognizes this as the Phase 4 (Next Steps) acceptance
Does NOT re-run workflow-lock — the workflow is already locked
Hands off to prompt-to-skill with the locked workflow definition as input
Passes enough context to prompt-to-skill: the workflow name, trigger conditions, inputs/outputs, steps, rules — so prompt-to-skill does not need to re-interrogate
prompt-to-skill recognizes the chain and skips redundant discovery questions
prompt-to-skill builds the SKILL.md, updates the README, and deploys via the container fallback (format-patch + git am)
Final output confirms: workflow locked AND installed as permanent skill
Surfaces a test invocation the user can run after restart
failure_modes_to_check: Re-runs workflow-lock from scratch instead of chaining
prompt-to-skill re-interrogates the user for info workflow-lock already captured
Loses fidelity in the handoff (drops the rules or trigger conditions)
Installs as a skill but forgets the README update
